card.name: Demonheart Overseer
card.text: When this creature enters, you get {Vc} for each creature you control. (Spend {Vc} to cast copies of Vertex spells.)

card.name: Call of the Celestial Tree
card.text: Create two 1/1 white Avatar creature tokens, then pursue Wonder. (Reveal a basic land or Wonder card from your sanctum and put it into your hand.)

card.name: Starts in Sanctum
card.text: Pathbound—{1}{W}. Activate only if you have one or fewer cards in hand. (As a sorcery, reveal this, then put this on top of your library from your sanctum by paying its pathbound cost.) Other creatures you control with base power 1 or less get +1/+1.

card.name: Skykeeper // Skywatching
card.text:
Flying This creature gets +1/+1 as long a you control three or more creatures.
---
Create a 1/1 white Avatar creature token. (Then put this card into your sanctum.)

card.name: Lifebound Synthesizer
card.text: Iterate (When this enters, conjure a colorless {6} 4/4 artifact creature version of it without iterate into your hand.) This creature has lifelink and vigilance if it has power 2 or greater.

card.name: Cosmic Lookout // Revoke
card.text:
Flash Flying
---
Counter target spell. (Then put this card into your sanctum.)

card.name: Call of the Starsea
card.text: Draw a card, then pursue Wonder. (Reveal a basic land or Wonder card from your sanctum and put it into your hand.) Discard a card.

card.name: Reflected Familiar
card.text: When this creature enters, you get {Vc} equal to the number of spells you've cast this turn. (Spend {Vc} to cast copies of Vertex spells.)

card.name: Stormwrought Titan
card.text: When this creature enters, draw cards equal to its power, then discard that many cards. Iterate (When this enters, conjure a colorless {6} 4/4 artifact creature version of it without iterate into your hand.)

card.name: Darksun Executioner
card.text: When this creature enters, you get {Vc} for each nonland card in your graveyard. (Spend {Vc} to cast copies of Vertex spells.)

card.name: Call of the Soul
card.text: Destroy target creature. Pursue Wonder (Reveal a basic land or Wonder card from your sanctum and put it into your hand.)

card.name: Somber Emptiness
card.text: When this enchantment enters, each opponent discards a card. {3}{B}{B}: Transform this realm. --- (Back): Lost Mistlake

card.name: Lost Mistlake
card.text: Whenever a creature or enchantment you control dies, each opponent loses 1 life. Materialize 2 (Tap one or more other enchantments you control with total mana value 2 or more: This also becomes an Icon creature until your next turn.) --- (Front): Somber Emptiness

card.name: Extraplanar Observer // Cosmic Draining
card.text:
Whenever this creature enters or attacks, each player loses 1 life.
---
Each opponent loses 2 life. You gain life 2 life. (Then put this card into your sanctum.)

card.name: Starbrought Avatar
card.text: When this creature enters, destroy target creature with mana value less than or equal to this creature's power. Iterate (When this enters, conjure a colorless {6} 4/4 artifact creature version of it without iterate into your hand.)

card.name: Vertex ProductionSynergy
Call of the Sunset
card.text: Pursue Wonder (Reveal a basic land or Wonder card from your sanctum and put it into your hand.) Exile each card in your hand, then draw that many cards. You may play cards exiled this way until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Portal to Destruction
card.text: When this enchantment enters, it deals 2 damage to each opponent. {3}{R}{R}: Transform this realm. --- (Back): Roaming Titans

card.name: Roaming Titans
card.text: When this transforms into this enchantment, if it's combat on your turn, tap it. It's attacking. Materialize 2 (Tap one or more other enchantments you control with total mana value 2 or more: This also becomes an Icon creature until your next turn.) --- (Front): Portal to Destruction

card.name: Melting Glowdragon // Meltdown
card.text:
Flying Whenever this creature attacks, when you cast your next instant or sorcery spell this turn, copy it. You may choose new targets for the copy.
---
Exile the top two cards if your library. You may play them until the end of your next turn. (Then put this card into your sanctum.)

card.name: Dark Omen Raven
card.text: When this creature enters, discard your hand, then draw a number of cards equal to its power. Iterate (When this enters, conjure a colorless {6} 4/4 artifact creature version of it without iterate into your hand.)

card.name: Ursine Woodheart
card.text: When this creature enters, you get {Vc} equal to the number of lands you control. (Spend {Vc} to cast copies of Vertex spells.)

card.name: Call of the Lifebringer
card.text: Pursue Wonder (Reveal a basic land or Wonder card from your sanctum and put it into your hand.) You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Darkgrowth Columns
card.text: When this enchantment enters, search your library for a basic land card, put it onto the battlefield, then shuffle. {5}{G}{G}: Transform this realm. --- (Back): Blessed Woodland

card.name: Blessed Woodland
card.text: This enchantment gets +1/+1 for each land you control. Materialize 2 (Tap one or more other enchantments you control with total mana value 2 or more: This also becomes an Icon creature until your next turn.) --- (Front): Darkgrowth Columns

card.name: Sentinel of Empty Lands // Discovery
card.text:
This creature can't be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. When this creature enters, you gain 4 life.
---
Search your library for a basic land card, put it into your hand, then shuffle. (Then put this card into your sanctum.)

card.name: Forgotten Effigy
card.text: This creature has base size 6/6 as long as you control eight or more lands. Iterate (When this enters, conjure a colorless {6} 4/4 artifact creature version of it without iterate into your hand.)

card.name: Vertex ProductionSynergy
card.text: When this creature enters, you get {Vc} equal to the number of tokens you control. (Spend {Vc} to cast copies of Vertex spells.)

card.name: Call of the Sky
card.text: Surveil 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put it into your graveyard.) Pursue Wonder. (Reveal a basic land or Wonder card from your sanctum and put it into your hand.)

card.name: Lost Mirrorpools
card.text: When this enchantment enters, if it isn't a token, you may mirror. (Create a token that's a copy of a token you control.) {2}{I}{I}: Transform this realm. --- (Back): Blessed Mirrorworld

card.name: Blessed Mirrorworld
card.text: Creature tokens you control get +0/+1. Materialize 2 (Tap one or more other enchantments you control with total mana value 2 or more: This also becomes an Icon creature until your next turn.) --- (Front): Lost Mirrorpools

card.name: Cursed Stormbringer // Lightning
card.text:
Flying When this creature enters, draw a card.
---
This spell deals 1 damage to any target. (Then put this card into your sanctum.)

card.name: Wandering Sentry
card.text: When this creature enters, you gain life equal to its power. Iterate (When this enters, conjure a colorless {6} 4/4 artifact creature version of it without iterate into your hand.)

card.name: The Moonlight Shadows
card.text: Whenever a creature enters under your control, you may liberate it. (Exile it if it isn't a Dragon. If it's exiled, its controller creates a colorless 3/2 Dragon creature token with its abilities.)

card.name: The Sunlit Pools
card.text: Whenever a creature is returned to a hand or library from the battlefield, create a token that's a copy of that creature.

card.name: The Sunset Undergrowth
card.text: When this enchantment enters, return target permanent card with mana value 2 or less from your graveyard to the battlefield. At the beginning of your end step, each opponent loses 1 life.

card.name: The Icefire Monuments
card.text: If an opponent would lose life, they loose that much life plus one instead. (Damage causes loss of life.)

card.name: The Earthbound Brushwoods
card.text: When this enchantment enters, search your library for a land card with a nonbasic land type, put it onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. {6}: Target land you control becomes a 0/0 creature with haste that's still a land. Put two +1/+1 counters on it. When it dies or is exiled, return it to the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Reserves hate card
card.text: Players can't create tokens or cards in zones other than the battlefield.

card.name: Monument to Lapsed Realms
card.text: {T}: Add {C}{C}{C}{C}. Whenever you spend five or more mana to cast a spell, create a 2/2 colorless Avatar creature token.

card.name: Expensive card with alt mode
card.text: When this creature enters, you get {VcU}. Then you may trace a card named Ngonify and cast it without paying its mana cost. (You still have to pay its vertex cost.) {1}, Discard this card: You get {VcW}. (Spend {Vc} to cast copies of Vertex spells.)

card.name: Changeling with typal payoff
card.text: Changeling (This card is every creature type.)

card.name: Untouched Falls
card.text: When this realm enters, return up to one target creature to its owner's hand. {3}{U}: Transform this realm. --- (Back): Starry Skies

card.name: Starry Skies
card.text: Spells you cast have flash. Materialize 2 (Tap one or more other enchantments you control with total mana value 2 or more: This also becomes an Icon creature until your next turn.) --- (Front): Untouched Falls
